entities.name: V
entities.context: The person being helped to defend their time and lock in deep work blocks

entities.name: Work Block Planner
entities.context: Strategic daily planning tool to identify fragmentation and lock in deep work

entities.name: Deep Work
entities.context: Focused work requiring 90+ minute blocks; the goal of the planning process

entities.name: Fragmentation
entities.context: Enemy of productivity; 30-minute scattered blocks described as useless

entities.name: Big Rock
entities.context: Metaphor for the one most important task that must move today

entities.name: Swiss Cheese
entities.context: Metaphor for fragmented calendar with holes of unusable time

entities.name: Time Defense
entities.context: Philosophy of actively protecting time blocks from interruption

entities.name: Landscape Review
entities.context: First step in Work Block Planner; analyzing calendar for fragmentation

entities.name: Defensive Strike
entities.context: Second step in Work Block Planner; identifying and locking 2-hour blocks

relationships.context: Tool helps V defend time and plan deep work
Core belief that deep work requires 90+ uninterrupted minutes
Belief that fragmentation is the enemy of productivity
Tool designed to enable deep work blocks
Big Rock is the priority target for deep work time
Swiss Cheese metaphor describes fragmented calendar state
First phase of the planning flow
Second phase of the planning flow
